name: firetv
title: Fire TV Cast
description: Cast YouTube and Stremio to Fire TV via Home Assistant
author: gtarraga

commands.name: cast-youtube
commands.title: Cast YouTube
commands.subtitle: SmartTube
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, play YouTube in SmartTube

commands.name: cast-stremio
commands.title: Cast Stremio
commands.subtitle: Stremio
commands.description: Turn on Fire TV and projector, open movie or show in Stremio

preferences.name: haUrl
preferences.title: Home Assistant URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Home Assistant instance

preferences.name: haToken
preferences.title: Home Assistant Token
preferences.description: Long-lived access token from HA → Security

preferences.name: hasProjector
preferences.title: Projector Connected
preferences.description: Wake projector via Wake-on-LAN before casting
preferences.label: Projector Connected

preferences.name: projectorMac
preferences.title: Projector MAC Address
preferences.description: MAC address for Wake-on-LAN magic packet
